headline: Head of forward-deployed engineering / GTM at Cognition
title: Head of FDE / GTM
confidenceNote: Public LinkedIn and X profiles confirm Cognition; event and secondary listings identify him around GTM/FDE rather than a generic AI Engineer title.
bioMarkdown: Works at Cognition on bringing Devin and agentic software engineering into customer environments. His public footprint sits at the intersection of engineering, GTM, and forward-deployed AI adoption, useful for conversations about AI coding agents, enterprise deployment, and developer-workflow change.

headline: Chief Strategy Officer at GLG

headline: AI product leader for capital markets and asset management
title: AI Product Manager
confidenceNote: Public sources strongly support AI product and capital-markets specialization, but company branding appears as Agentive Labs in LinkedIn snippets and Applied Agents on the public site.
bioMarkdown: Builds and advises on AI workflows for regulated finance, especially fixed income. Her background combines Citi Global Securitized Markets experience, data and AI product work, AWS credentials, and practical AI governance for teams adopting agents and assistants.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public snippets identify Camille as an AI Product Manager / Head of AI / fractional CAIO focused on capital markets and asset management, with Agentive Labs listed.

primary.label: Applied Agents website
primary.note: Practice site describes AI advisory and build work for fixed income, with background in Citi securitized markets, AI product work, AWS credentials, and AI governance.

secondary.label: LinkedIn post profile card
secondary.note: Profile card references Senior AI Product Manager experience and Disney/Citi background.

headline: President and co-founder of the Mormon Transhumanist Association
title: President
confidenceNote: Personal site, LinkedIn, and MTA-related sources consistently confirm his MTA leadership, Provo location, and software/blockchain background.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and president of the Mormon Transhumanist Association, where he explores the intersection of science, technology, religion, and human flourishing. He also has more than 25 years of full-stack engineering experience, including AWS blockchain work, Cisco, Omniture, Divvy, and blockchain infrastructure.

primary.label: Personal website
primary.note: Confirms MTA co-founder/president role, Provo location, software engineering background, AWS blockchain work, and other career details.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public snippet lists President & CEO at Mormon Transhumanist Association in Provo.

secondary.label: Reddit AMA
secondary.note: Carl introduces himself as MTA co-founder and current president.

secondary.note: Discusses Carl's role in the Mormon Transhumanist Association and technology-faith themes.

headline: Founder of FIWORK and builder in AI, blockchain, and prediction markets
title: Founder
confidenceNote: Personal site and ecosystem sources identify Carlos Rene Cerrato as founder/CEO of FIWORK, based in Costa Rica, with AI and blockchain focus.
bioMarkdown: Founder of FIWORK and CEO of DEGA, working across AI automations, prediction markets, blockchain infrastructure, and autonomous agents. His public profiles emphasize R&D and software development for Midnight, EVM protocols, Cardano, and enterprise-style AI systems.
